title: Christmas Bouquet Pop Up Christmas Greeting Card Second Nature 3D Cards Pop Ups XPOP067
features: A Pop Up Christmas Greeting Card
Not just any card, this award winning pop up greeting card springs to life from it's envelope
A miracle in paper engineering these unique 3D cards pop up to form a stunning card display making any card from this range perfect for festive celebrations
Each card comes flat in an envelope and measures 12cm x 17cm or 5" x 7" when closed and 25cm x 20cm or 9" x 8" once opened
Simply close the pop up flat and write your message in the space on the side of the card before placing in the envelope for sending with a 'Large Letter' postage stamp
description: Brighten their home on those dark December mornings with this 3D Christmas Bouquet Pop Up Christmas Card by Second Nature You are viewing: A Pop Up Greeting Card Occasion: Perfect for Christmas Message: The rear of the card has been left blank for your own personal message Details: Not just any card, this award winning pop up greeting card springs to life from it's envelope Good to know: A miracle in paper engineering these unique 3D cards pop up to form a stunning card display making any card from this range perfect for a special occasion Card Size: Each card comes flat in an envelope and measures 12cm x 17cm or 5" x 7" when closed and 25cm x 20cm or 9" x 8" once opened Postal Size: Large Letter Instructions: Just close the pop up flat and write your message in the space on the side of the card or on the tag provided before placing in the envelope for sending
